THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHAT IS ALLEGED TO BE DUE AND OWING AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THIS DEFENDANT HAS NO INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS CLAUDIA CARDINALLE AND ETHAN FARID JINIAN'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT THEY ARE LIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. SERVICE OF A NEW NOTICE OF DEFAULT WAS NOT NECESSARY. (CC SECTION 1058.5, CHAMPLAIE V. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP (E.D. CAL 2009 709 F SUPP 2ND 1029.) NO DEFECT EXISTS IN THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANTS COMPLIED WITH THE COMPREHENSIVE CC SECTION 2924 SCHEME. A MERE AGENT CAN COMMENCE THE FORECLOSURE PROCESS. (SEE GOMES V. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. (2011) 192 CAL.APP.4TH 1149.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS CLAUDIA CARDINALLE AND ETHAN FARID JINIAN'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Ralph A. Kerstetter, Esq. of Kerstetter Law Group 462-1966 for pltfs & moving parties; Clayton Gaddis, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5574 for defts & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT THEY ARE LIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. SERVICE OF A NEW NOTICE OF DEFAULT WAS NOT NECESSARY. (CC SECTION 1058.5, CHAMPLAIE V. BAC HOME LOANS SERVICING, LP (E.D. CAL 2009 709 F SUPP 2ND 1029.) NO DEFECT EXISTS IN THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANTS COMPLIED WITH THE COMPREHENSIVE CC SECTION 2924 SCHEME. A MERE AGENT CAN COMMENCE THE FORECLOSURE PROCESS. (SEE GOMES V. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. (2011) 192 CAL.APP.4TH 1149.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained in part and overruled in part. As to the 4th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead what is alleged to be due and owing as to this defendant. As to the 3rd cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend because this defendant has no interest in the property. The demurrer is overruled as to all other causes of action on all other grounds. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
